title: Skypiea Sees the Storm
description: Skypieans and Shandia face Enel’s lightning judgment as the battle becomes a desperate fight to save everyone beneath the clouds.
scene: Across pages 6, 7, 8, 9, this scene focuses on Narrator, Enel, Luffy, Nami, Aisa. Skypieans and Shandia face Enel’s lightning judgment as the battle becomes a desperate fight to save everyone beneath the clouds.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: This country will soon be no more!

dialogue.speaker: Aisa
dialogue.text: The despair of a crumbling island...

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: No one can stop it anymore!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: He's melting down the gold wall!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Huff... Rubber human of the Blue Seas...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Get this off of me, you bastard!

dialogue.speaker: Pagaya
dialogue.text: So let us part ways here.

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: But for putting up a valiant fight...

summary: Skypieans and Shandia face Enel’s lightning judgment as the battle becomes a desperate fight to save everyone beneath the clouds.
